context: Verify that the agent produces a valid markdownlint config that encodes the skill's anti-patterns as enforced rules, with explanatory notes.

checklist.name: `"default": true` is set
checklist.description: The `.markdownlint.json` file contains `"default": true` so all standard rules are enabled unless explicitly overridden.

checklist.name: Fenced code language rule is configured
checklist.description: The config includes a setting for rule MD040 (or equivalent) that requires language tags on fenced code blocks.

checklist.name: Heading level sequence rule is configured
checklist.description: The config includes a setting for rule MD001 (or equivalent) that enforces sequential heading levels with no skips.

checklist.name: List marker consistency rule is configured
checklist.description: The config includes a setting for rule MD004 (or equivalent) that enforces a single list marker style.

checklist.name: No rules are globally disabled
checklist.description: No rule is set to `false` in the config. All configured rules are either enabled (`true`) or given a specific option value.

checklist.name: Notes file explains each configured rule
checklist.description: The `markdownlint-notes.md` file includes one entry per configured rule explaining its purpose and which anti-pattern it prevents.
